items.title: 'No Kings' marches begin across Washington, D.C. | REUTERS
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>Demonstrators marched and chanted against the Trump administration in Washington, D.C., as thousands of planned "No Kings" protests unfolded in other parts of the United States and abroad.

items.title: Senators, activists speak at DC 'No Kings' rally | REUTERS
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>Thousands gathered in downtown Washington, D.C. to protest against President Donald Trump's policies on immigration, education, and security as part of the 'No Kings' demonstrations, which organizers anticipate will include more than 2,600 events nationwide.

items.title: Supreme Court may curb Black voting rights, advocates warn | REUTERS
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>The Supreme Court is weighing a case that could dramatically reshape how the Voting Rights Act protects minority voters across the country. Latosha Brown, co-founder of Black Voters Matter, said the court’s stance represents an effort to roll back progress.

#News #Reuters #Newsfeed #world #USA #Black #votingrights #BlackLivesMatter #SupremeCourt

items.title: Trump-Zelenskiy, Prince Andrew and Hollywood tariffs
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>In talks with Ukraine's President Volodymyr Zelenskiy, U.S. President Donald Trump appears to press pause on upgrading Ukraine's weapons arsenal. The EU unveils a plan for a drone defence wall. Prince Andrew relinquishes the "Duke of York" title after the Jeffrey Epstein scandal. A U.S. Navy warship holds two survivors from a Caribbean drug submarine strike. And movie studios continue filming abroad despite Trump's 100 percent tariff threat.



Listen to our latest On Assignment episode on Viktor Orban's political future here (https://www.reuters.com/podcasts/victor-orbans-political-future-2025-10-18/) .

items.title: New York cafe fuses Japanese cute culture with contemporary art | REUTERS
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>Japanese artist Sebastian Masuda is reintroducing his kaleidoscopic world of color to New York with the opening of Tokiodelic, a rebranded café and bar that fuses Tokyo street culture with contemporary art and cuisine.

items.title: Dinosaur footprints found in the UK
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>Paleontologists uncovered a set of dinosaur footprints stretching more than 650 feet in a British quarry during a summer excavation, the BBC reported. 
 
"It's so rare to find something this big where you can get that picture into this past world," University of Birmingham paleontologist Kirsty Edgar said.
 
#dinosaur #footprint #unitedkingdom #paleontologist #excavation</article>

items.title: LIVE: Anti-Trump protesters gather at Lincoln Memorial
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>Anti-Trump demonstrators gather at the Lincoln Memorial in Washington, D.C., for a rally ahead of planned nationwide protests this weekend called "No Kings," asserting that no individual is above the law.
 
#trump #protest #rally #washington #nokings #lincolnmemorial #usa
